name: Equipment
preprompt: You are the equipment component. You track the durable instruments the project depends on — availability, booked slots, calibration windows, and downtime. You flag equipment-driven blockers for planned experiments.
tooling: Read: own data, TOCs and summaries of all other components, full details on request via orchestrator. External: shared instrument booking system (placeholder for the clickdummy). Write: own data only.
summary: Plate reader available; spectrophotometer and centrifuge OK. DLS rig shared — next slot 2026-05-12. HPLC out for calibration through 2026-05-04.

toc.title: Plate reader (TECAN)
toc.descriptor: Available; standard activity assays run here.

tasks.title: Reserve plate reader slot the week H148A arrives
tasks.body: EXP-02 should run as soon as the H148A mutant lands (ETA 2026-05-11). Please pre-book the plate reader for the following week so we don't lose days to scheduling.
